title: run_on_new_thread: correct solution for synchronous AWS client construction inside async context
description: The run_on_new_thread helper (used by AwsSmBackend, AwsSsmBackend, AwsKmsBackend from_uri) is the correct solution for calling async AWS config loading synchronously. The alternatives — block_in_place and Handle::block_on — both panic when called from a current_thread runtime (the default in #[tokio::test]). The scoped-thread approach with its own runtime is the only pattern that works in both current_thread and multi_thread executors. The comment 'DO NOT replace this with tokio::task::block_in_place' is important; a contributor who does not understand the runtime model will miss this.
